# Pull Request Template

## Description

<!-- Please describe the changes made in this pull request -->

## Type of Change

<!-- Please mark the appropriate type -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (non-breaking change that improves code quality)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test coverage

## Related Issues

<!-- Link to related issues using #issue_number -->

Fixes #
Related to #

## Checklist

<!-- Please ensure all items are checked before submitting -->

- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review of code has been performed
- [ ] Comments added for complex code sections
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Tests added for new functionality
- [ ] All tests pass locally
- [ ] No warnings or errors introduced
- [ ] Breaking changes are documented

## Testing

<!-- Please describe how this change was tested -->

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing performed
- [ ] Network simulation tested (for routing changes)

## Additional Notes

<!-- Any additional information reviewers should know -->

## Reviewer Checklist

<!-- For reviewers to mark off -->

- [ ] Code is readable and follows style guidelines
- [ ] Tests adequately cover the changes
- [ ] Edge cases are handled properly
- [ ] Security considerations addressed
- [ ] Performance impact evaluated
